_comment: Example MCP configuration for the PM workspace. Copy to .mcp.json (gitignored) and fill in your own paths/keys. See https://modelcontextprotocol.io for the full spec.

filesystem._comment: Local filesystem access for the workspace itself. Lets the agent read raw/, wiki/, and workspace/ as MCP resources rather than via Read tool.

memory._comment: Optional: persistent memory across sessions for facts the agent learns about your portfolio.

fetch._comment: Optional: lets the agent fetch URLs the PM pastes (e.g., competitor docs, public RFCs).

search._comment: Optional: search across raw/ and wiki/ as a vector or keyword index. Replace with your preferred MCP search server (e.g., qdrant, sqlite-fts).
